title: Blades Derby
body:
Welcome to Blades Derby, an Umapyoi mod & SlashBlade:Resharped addon.

This addon added 4 new SlashBlade related to Umamusume, new support card and new skills for umamusume.

Stay tuned as the content continues to be updated.

Enjoy!![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec7851b146f564dab8103258a2302e7af667119b_0.webp)
